title: The Giants Rush Toward Crisis
description: On pages 8–10, this part follows Robin, Unknown person #7, Children, Unknown person #8, Giants, Loki as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: In short, you naively assumed those brats...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Too bad we don't have a video feed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You! Do you remember the names of all the kids we had march out of here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Alright, then you'll inform the parents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's about time for the children to wake up from their dreams.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What are we doing walking out here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Dunno, but I bet it's far away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nu-uh! This is branch 18, the way back home!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but our bodies are still moving on their own, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, we're not going home?! but I wanna!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You can't see them! We've been kidnapped!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Saul seems to have been taken out!! Turn back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship has sprung a leak! And we've got broken oars!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it!! What's this creature supposed to be?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Not sure, some kind of beastly woman?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one over there looks like my wife...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, aren't these things just the kids' fears come to life?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, if what bent finds scary is his mom, then that means...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can't do this! Our spirits aren't strong enough!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone would be scared by that, even US!!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
